message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_22-41-54_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "quote base premium for 2 runes is 50 G (no block)"
Expected: 2 runes (newcomer) → premium 60 G
Current error: Expected 60, received 33
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_22-41-54_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

The current code only reads items[0]. Now sum the base premiums over all items, apply first-insurance per item, then add fee. Use minimal change: replace `const base = BASE_PREMIUMS[input.items[0].type]` with `const base = input.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUMS[item.type], 0)`.

Verify all 7 tests pass after the change.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously.

content.text: I'll analyze the test, make the minimal change, and verify all tests pass.

input.old_string:
const base = BASE_PREMIUMS[input.items[0].type];
  return { premium: Math.ceil(base + base * FIRST_INSURANCE_RATE + PROCESSING_FEE) };
input.new_string:
const base = input.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUMS[item.type], 0);
  return { premium: Math.ceil(base + base * FIRST_INSURANCE_RATE + PROCESSING_FEE) };

content.text:
All 7 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Replaced `input.items[0].type` lookup with a `reduce` summing `BASE_PREMIUMS[item.type]` across all items.
**Result**: All tests now pass (7 passing, 43 todo).
**Approach**: Minimal change - swapped the single-item base lookup with a reduce that sums base premiums per item. First-insurance rate and processing fee logic was preserved. For 2 runes: base = 25 + 25 = 50, first = 5, fee = 5, total = 60 G as expected. All previous single-item tests still pass because reduce over a single-element array yields the same value as items[0].

Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_22-41-54_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
